title: An entire Herculaneum scroll has been read for the first time
author: verditelabs
aiHeadline: After 2,000 years of sitting in a volcano, someone finally got bored enough to read this scroll.

title: Show HN: I made Google Trends for Hacker News by indexing 18 years of comments
author: ytkimirti
aiHeadline: Someone spent 18 years of their life indexing HN comments, and now you can finally find out what everyone was arguing about in 2008.

title: Apple raises prices of MacBooks, iPads
author: virgildotcodes
aiHeadline: Apple prices go up because, hey, why not? It's not like you have any other choice or budget constraints, right?

title: Half-Life 2 in a Browser
author: panza
aiHeadline: Half-Life 2 in a browser? Sure, why not? It's not like we didn't already have it on every other platform, but now you can play it while waiting for your email to load.

title: Om Malik has died
author: minimaxir
aiHeadline: Om Malik has died, proving once again that even the coolest people can't escape the grim reaper. RIP, internet legend.
